chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1321 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 11-10-2023 Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. Gul Muhammad (respondent No.5) present in person. ***** Mr. Umrah Khan Yousifzai, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.5. Respondent No.5 present in person submits that on misconception and misunderstanding, he lodged FIR of abduction of petitioner, his wife, as at that time, he was not aware about her whereabouts. Petitioner present in person submits that although she has filed a Suit for Khulla against the respondent No.5, her husband, but she has reconciled with him and is willing to reside with him. Respondent No.5, her husband, has replied that he would make a statement before the I.O of the case for disposal of the case as on account of miscommunication and misperception, FIR was lodged by him. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. However, the I.O shall dispose of the case on the statement of respondent No.5, husband of the petitioner within a period of one week and send the compliance report through mail. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
